summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 new enhancements to appsaavy.space signal graph: (1) clickable legend toggles, (2) space-universe styling with starfield, (3) new /catalog view, (4) enhanced graph spacing, (5) 24 new real data properties (now 52 signals total). All new features working perfectly. Backend 100% functional (10/10 tests). Frontend 100% functional (11/11 tests). All regression tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/graph returns 90 nodes (32 providers, 52 signals, 6 aggregators) and 212 links with correct stats
Backend: GET /api/signals returns 52 signals with correct distribution (30 Property, 18 Signal, 4 Entity). Verified Email has 10 providers (>= 8 required)
Backend: GET /api/universes returns 4 universes with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/providers returns 32 providers
Backend: GET /api/provider/apollo-io returns 10 signals, 3 connectors (REST API, MCP Server, Clay Native), MCP URL https://mcp.apollo.io
Backend: GET /api/provider/zoominfo returns valid provider detail
Backend: GET /api/provider/crustdata returns 29 signals including all 3 NEW signals: Web Traffic, Glassdoor Rating, LinkedIn Followers
Backend: GET /api/provider/non-existent returns 404 as expected
Backend: GET /api/crawl-jobs returns empty list without error
Backend: POST /api/intel/chat streams SSE response with session, 30 delta events, done event, references real providers (Cognism, Lusha, Apollo) wrapped in [[brackets]]
Frontend NEW: Graph/Catalog nav segment toggles correctly (nav-graph active on /, nav-catalog active on /catalog)
Frontend NEW: Legend toggles work - clicking legend-toggle-property/galaxy/sun adds/removes 'off' class, no JS errors
Frontend NEW: Catalog view at /catalog shows 52 catalog cards, hides universe tabs and search trigger
Frontend NEW: Catalog type filters work correctly (Property: 30 cards, Signal: 18 cards, Entity: 4 cards, All: 52 cards)
Frontend NEW: Catalog search filters cards by text (searching 'email' shows 1 card, clearing shows all 52)
Frontend NEW: Catalog provider chip navigation - clicking chip navigates to /?node=<slug> and opens Galaxy panel
Frontend REGRESSION: Universe filter tabs toggle on/off correctly (Technographic tab adds/removes 'active' class)
Frontend REGRESSION: Galaxy panel via deep link /?node=crustdata opens panel with provider name, 29 signals including new ones, MCP URL
Frontend REGRESSION: Command palette opens with Cmd+K, filters nodes by text, selecting item opens Galaxy panel
Frontend REGRESSION: Node SEO page /node/apollo-io displays title, 3 connector badges, 10 signals, View in Graph button navigates to /?node=apollo-io and opens Galaxy panel
Frontend REGRESSION: Graph spacing enhanced (forceManyBody -620, distanceMax 1100, collide +22) and space-universe styling (320 stars, brighter nodes with luminous cores)
